description: June 19,1865, two and a half years after the Emancipation Proclamation slaves in Texas were informed they were free. As up until this day we are still fighting for freedom.
title: Juneteenth T-Shirt

images.alt: Nat Turner University Forest Green Tee Model
images.caption: Nat Turner University Forest Green Tee Model

description: Nat Turner University is a salute to freedom fighters who believed in self defense. Nat Turner, Harriet Tubman, Frederick Douglass, Ida B. Wells, Malcolm X, Huey P. Newton, George Jackson, and Assata Shakur are just a few who believed in the doctrine of armed self-defense.
title: Nat Turner University T-Shirt

description:
Unapologetically Black is a crowd favorite for that person who has dispelled all notions of black inferiority.

This one is sure to spark remarks like, “where did you get that shirt from”.
title: Unapologetically Black T-Shirt

description:
Homeland Security signifies “the more things change the more they stay the same”.  The Black Panther Party, founded by Huey Newton and Bobby Seal, led a movement to curtail police brutality through armed self-defense.  

Often times the Black Power/self-defense philosophies of the 1960’s are given little recognition; instead, more credit is bestowed on the non-violent organizations. Groups such as The Black Panther Party, Nation of Islam, & Deacons for Defense were major forces in affecting social change during the turbulent 60’s as well!
title: Panthers - Homeland Security T-Shirt

description:
Black history is really self explanatory, but we will say that this shirt is a Black History Month favorite.

The multiple icons within the shape of Africa is our way of acknowledging the importance of knowing ones history before we were forced to these shores.
title: Black History T-Shirt

description:
﻿What needs to be said about the "Moses" of our time that isn’t already captured within this print!?

One unique twist we added is color to this originally black and white photo.

If you ain't up on Harriet Tubman you need to "get woke" quickly... or exit this site!
title: Harriet Tubman T-Shirt

description:
Female legends - unquestionably black female legends is the most popular tee shirt requested by ladies.

This shirt pays recognition to those heroines who led the way in the fight for freedom and equality.
title: Black Female Legends T-Shirt

images.alt: Black Lives Matter Fist Tee Model
images.caption: Black Lives Matter Fist Tee Model

images.alt: Black Lives Matter Fist - Dark Chocolate
images.caption: Black Lives Matter Fist - Dark Chocolate

description: Black Lives Matter is perhaps our most contemporary design. The  Black lives tee infuses the modern Black Lives Matter mantra with the Black Power fist silhouette from the 1960’s.d the way”!
title: Black Lives Matter Fist T-Shirt

description:
Killmonger - all who have seen the movie Black Panther recall this line… 

This tee is always a conversation piece. 

Although a fictitious character this shirt still ranks among one of the most sought after tees among the 30 and under crowd.
title: Killmonger T-Shirt

description: The I'm Too Blessed Tee attempts to point out that in spite of whatever trials and tribulations one may be going through there is always something to be grateful for..be it family, health or a roof over your head. It's all about perspective.
title: Im Too Blessed T-Shirt

description:
Mixed with Hood is a play on how our people love saying they’re mixed with Indian or white...

All who consider themselves hardcore marvel over this tee. 

The intent here was to make a bold statement, which hopefully results in critical dialogue.
title: Mixed With Hood T-Shirt

description: Unsung heroes is a salute to Tommie Smith and John  Carlos... their symbolic stance of black solidarity, at the 1968 Olympic Games, sent shock waves around the world and cost them their medals, track careers, and in many respects their lives. Long live the spirit and legacy of these champions.
title: Unsung Heroes T-Shirt

description:
Why I vote commemorates the brave civil rights activists-both known and unknown- who risked life and limb during the turbulent 1950’ & 60’s.

Freedom riders, lunch counter sit-ins, Birmingham protestors, The Little Rock Nine, Dr. King, & Bloody Sunday all are captured in this dynamic shirt.

It is often said, “when you don’t know your history you are bound to repeat it”! To all onlookers this shirt truly conveys “I know Our-story & who paved the way”!
title: Why I Vote T-Shirt

images.alt: Ali - I Shook Up The World - Black
images.caption: Ali - I Shook Up The World - Black

images.alt: Ali - I Shook Up The World Tee Model
images.caption: Ali - I Shook Up The World Tee Model

description:
Ali’s shook up the world illustrates “the Louisville Lip” at his best.

This vintage tee is a must for fans of “THE GOAT!”
title: Ali - I Shook Up The World T-Shirt

description:
Black College Matters attracts past, current and future HBCU attendees.

This tee is always a fan favorite at HBCU homecoming venues.
title: Black Colleges Matter T-Shirt
